Notes: 2014-2015 CUNYAC/Army ROTC Women's Basketball Championships - Quarterfinals
#2 Brooklyn advances to Semifinals Round on Tuesday, February 24th at CCNY.
Will play #3 Staten Island/#6 John Jay winner at 8:00 pm
Megan Campbell Named Player of the Game.
Game.Officials: Leon Barrett,  Tracy Stamper,  Kristen Piscadlo
